title: zootrophion dayanum
intro: Zootrophion dayanum, also known as Dayan's Zootrophion, is a species of orchid native to Ecuador. This plant is prized for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever and inflammation, due to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Zootrophion dayanum include its ability to reduce oxidative stress and improve cardiovascular health, making it a valuable addition to traditional medicine. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or tincture for its medicinal uses, although modern herbal preparations may involve further processing to enhance its bioavailability and effectiveness.
